## S&P Global upgrades Taiwan Semiconductor's credit rating to AA

An AA credit rating for TSM is a structural positive — it reduces the cost of the massive capex program required to build out advanced-node capacity globally, reinforcing the foundry's long-term competitive moat and reducing financial risk in the expansion plan.

- S&P Global raised TSM's credit rating to AA.
- The upgrade reflects S&P's assessment of TSM's strengthened financial position or creditworthiness.
- A higher credit rating lowers TSM's cost of debt, supporting the ability to fund the company's capital-intensive global fab expansion.
- No specific rationale, outlook change, or financial metric is disclosed in the headline beyond the rating action itself.
